summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of production-ready website update with 6 new reusable components, 14-section service pages, animated scroll-in effects, and interactive features across all page types
passed_tests: Homepage loads with animated sections and scroll-in effects working

Service page /services/artificial-intelligence has 13/14 sections (hero, impact stats, subservices, tech stack, process, CTA, why choose us + stats, related case studies, industries served tabs, testimonials carousel, blog resources, FAQ, contact form)
Service page /services/generative-ai loads all 9 key sections correctly
Service page /services/devops loads all 9 key sections
Industry page /industries/healthcare has 10/11 sections (hero, capabilities, impact stats, CTA, process, case studies, testimonials, blog, FAQ, contact form)
Industry page /industries/retail loads all 10 sections perfectly
Solution page /solutions/databrain-ai has testimonials and blog sections (8/8 sections total)
Case study page /case-studies/ai-video-creation has testimonials and blog sections (9/9 sections total)
Subservice expand/collapse functionality works on service detail pages
Industries Served tabs switch content correctly (healthcare, retail tabs tested)
Testimonials carousel prev/next buttons work on service pages
Blog cards in Related Blog section link correctly
Contact form fields are functional and accept input
FAQ sections are present on all updated pages
Case study results metrics display correctly
AnimatedSection component provides smooth scroll-in effects
All 6 new reusable components (AnimatedSection, ImpactStats, RelatedCaseStudies, TestimonialsSection, IndustriesServed, RelatedBlog) are working correctly
